utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: present and clearly specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and costs. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: present with home/contents insurance and cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: present with plan and cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: present with multiple services, each with descriptions and costs. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: present with monthly, annual (excluding one-time fee), and one-time fee. Fully specified. All 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items that match names in the ground-truth ratings. Map each selected plan/service to its exact corresponding rating: InsurePlus Standard Plan is chosen for both physical and mental health; InsurePlus Standard Coverage is chosen for home contents; InsurePlus Standard Plan is chosen for travel insurance; additional services include Emergency Mental Health Care, Family Therapy Coverage, Premium Insurance Membership (called Premium Insurance Membership in ground truth), and Insurance Portfolio Management. Each of these items has a listed rating in the ground-truth data.
